editions.name: The White Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull White Edition is the taste of Coconut and Acai

editions.name: The Red Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Red Edition with Watermelon taste

editions.name: The Apple Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Apple Edition combines the freshness of Fuji Apple with the warm spice of Ginger

editions.name: Energy Drink Zero
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Zero Energy Drink provides wings with no calories

editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Energy Drink is the best companion for athletes, students, people in demanding professions, and long-distance drivers worldwide

editions.name: The Blue Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Blue Edition with Blueberry taste

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Sugarfree Wings: The sugarfree version of Red Bull Energy Drink is Red Bull Sugarfree

editions.name: The Yellow Edition
editions.flavor_description: A refreshing blend of sudachi and lime with subtle notes of Pomelo and citrus peel

editions.name: The Peach Edition
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Peach Edition combines the refreshing taste of White Peach with a touch of citrus peel and floral notes

editions.name: The Lilac Edition Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Lilac Edition Sugarfree energy drink combines the taste of Pomelo with floral notes

_translated_editions.name: The Yellow Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Yellow Edition. Sudachi and lime taste, completed with light notes of pomelo and citrus peel.
